description: Single LLM call per preference. No RAG, no disagreement, no hallucination check, no retry.

results.preference: I am a Liverpool fan and I love watching Liverpool play
captions: Gakpo scores for Liverpool at 12 minutes, Reds lead 1-0, Anfield erupts.
Salah nets penalty at 78 minutes, sealing 2-0 win for Liverpool.
Manchester City subs in Matheus Nunes at 57 minutes, seeking momentum.
İ. Gündoğan replaces Savinho at 58 minutes, City pushes for goal.
Gakpo exits, D. Núñez enters at 73 minutes, fresh legs for Liverpool.
Alexander-Arnold subs out, Quansah in at 73 minutes, defensive tweak.

results.preference: I support Manchester City and I follow Manchester City closely

T. Alexander-Arnold replaced by J. Quansah at 73 minutes, defensive switch.
